I am right-handed, and my son is left-handed.

When I get a slice of bread out of the bag, I can tell if he was the last one to get a slice, because the twist-tie is twisted the opposite direction from how I twist it.

I love when this happens. It's a little touch of connection.

text:
I have a theory about exercise and depression.

Lots of ppl will be like "just exercise, depressed person, it will cure you"

Nope

But it can act on depression like steroids act on an infection

Temporarily relieve some symptoms, gives you some space to be in less pain

raw.full_text:
I have a theory about exercise and depression.

Lots of ppl will be like "just exercise, depressed person, it will cure you"

Nope

But it can act on depression like steroids act on an infection

Temporarily relieve some symptoms, gives you some space to be in less pain

text:
The really difficult bit is that when you're deeply depressed, exercise can be almost impossible to get yourself to do

This is hard to explain to someone who has not experienced depression

raw.full_text:
The really difficult bit is that when you're deeply depressed, exercise can be almost impossible to get yourself to do

This is hard to explain to someone who has not experienced depression

text:
I think this makes a regular rhythm of exercise very very very important for ppl with depression

b/c that regularity lowers the barrier, even if only slightly, to doing it when you're depressed

raw.full_text:
I think this makes a regular rhythm of exercise very very very important for ppl with depression

b/c that regularity lowers the barrier, even if only slightly, to doing it when you're depressed

text:
The ideaspace of ambition is largely underexplored and, crucially, undermapped.

(thread coming)

raw.full_text:
The ideaspace of ambition is largely underexplored and, crucially, undermapped.

(thread coming)

text: Underexplored: there is likely much more to ambition — much more that it can encompass, describe, allow, empower, etc. than most people understand.

raw.full_text: Underexplored: there is likely much more to ambition — much more that it can encompass, describe, allow, empower, etc. than most people understand.

text: Undermapped: For however much ambition is or has been explored, it is definitionally less mapped. And the mapping is what is most legible and immediately useful (and thus impactful) to most people.

raw.full_text: Undermapped: For however much ambition is or has been explored, it is definitionally less mapped. And the mapping is what is most legible and immediately useful (and thus impactful) to most people.

text: Exploring and then mapping, and most importantly then widely disseminating that map, is what makes the ideaspace — the full ideaspace — of ambition inhabitable to many more people.

raw.full_text: Exploring and then mapping, and most importantly then widely disseminating that map, is what makes the ideaspace — the full ideaspace — of ambition inhabitable to many more people.

text: So it is a responsibility, a gift to the commons, to humanity, for people inclined to explore this ideaspace, to also map it and publish those maps to the wider public.

raw.full_text: So it is a responsibility, a gift to the commons, to humanity, for people inclined to explore this ideaspace, to also map it and publish those maps to the wider public.

text:
Ok so, exploring:
Ambition is typically understood as relating to career, job, money, etc. But ambition can be a descriptor of a person's posture & in almost any realm. Art, parenting, friendship, community, neighborliness, thinking, communicating, philosophy, etc. etc. etc.

raw.full_text:
Ok so, exploring:
Ambition is typically understood as relating to career, job, money, etc. But ambition can be a descriptor of a person's posture & in almost any realm. Art, parenting, friendship, community, neighborliness, thinking, communicating, philosophy, etc. etc. etc.

text: Perhaps ambition could be best understood as the animating force of a person. Someone who exudes aliveness — who is irreversibly animated toward a purpose — maybe that person necessarily has ambition.

raw.full_text: Perhaps ambition could be best understood as the animating force of a person. Someone who exudes aliveness — who is irreversibly animated toward a purpose — maybe that person necessarily has ambition.

text: Does this mean that ambition is a necessary precursor to aliveness, to an animated life? Maybe.

raw.full_text: Does this mean that ambition is a necessary precursor to aliveness, to an animated life? Maybe.

text: If so, I do suspect that there is no requirement that a person be conscious of that ambition — perhaps they even self-identify as "not ambitious" because they view ambition through the co-opted lens of career, material wealth, etc. that the word broadly evokes.

raw.full_text: If so, I do suspect that there is no requirement that a person be conscious of that ambition — perhaps they even self-identify as "not ambitious" because they view ambition through the co-opted lens of career, material wealth, etc. that the word broadly evokes.

text: So, why does this even matter? Is there benefit to be had from by revising our societal understanding of what ambition can be? I suspect yes, because many see ambition as having a very positive connotation.

raw.full_text: So, why does this even matter? Is there benefit to be had from by revising our societal understanding of what ambition can be? I suspect yes, because many see ambition as having a very positive connotation.

text: If we can broaden the scope of what ambition might imply, then we can get people to apply that positive connotation to a wider range of net-good behaviors that will lead to an increase in human flourishing.

raw.full_text: If we can broaden the scope of what ambition might imply, then we can get people to apply that positive connotation to a wider range of net-good behaviors that will lead to an increase in human flourishing.
